statement.en: Lean 4 progress: Interval Arithmetic — 10 theorems/lemmas, 0 sorry, 0 axiom
statement.ja: Lean 4 進捗: Interval Arithmetic — 定理 10 / sorry 0 / axiom 0
statement.headerDoc:
STEP 1007 (β) — Interval Arithmetic / 区間演算 sample
  藤本伸樹 + Claude Opus 4.7 — 2026-04-28

  Demonstrates basic interval arithmetic in Lean 4 + Mathlib v4.27.
  Foundation for physical applications (Kepler-style sphere packing,
  numerical analysis with rigorous bounds, sensitivity analysis).

  Mathlib has `Set.Icc`, `Set.Ioo` etc. for interval representations.
  Here we define a thin wrapper `BoundedInterval` and prove properties
  needed for downstream physical / numerical formalization.

  Tier 8 mathlib-unformalized references:
    - Kepler conjecture (sphere packing, Hales 2017 Flyspeck) —

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Zero-sorry verified by lake env lean
